home.title: Sahakum Khmer
home.subtitle: Community • Culture • Integration
home.hero_description: We help Cambodians integrate into Swedish society through community activities, cultural exchange and support.

blog.share_description: Share this article with friends and colleagues

board.boardDescription: Meet the dedicated leaders guiding Sahakum Khmer towards our mission
board.boardLeadingDescription: Meet the dedicated leaders guiding our community towards a brighter future
board.boardMembersDescription: A passionate team dedicated to serving our community
board.joinCommunityDescription: Be part of something bigger. Join Sahakum Khmer and help build a stronger Cambodian-Swedish community.

playlist.title: Shared Playlist
playlist.subtitle: Create or join a shared music room for your community event
playlist.createRoomDesc: Start a new shared playlist for your event
playlist.joinRoomDesc: Enter a room code to join an existing playlist
playlist.clearQueueDescription: This will remove all queued videos from the playlist. Videos that have already been played will not be affected. This action cannot be undone.
playlist.addFirstVideo: Add a YouTube video to get started
playlist.serviceUnavailableDesc: The playlist service is currently offline. Please check back later.
playlist.loginRequiredDesc: Room creation is currently limited to registered users.
playlist.atCapacityDesc: All room slots are currently in use. Please try again in a few minutes.
playlist.invalidYoutubeUrl: Please enter a valid YouTube URL
playlist.displayScreenHint: Open this on a TV or projector — video plays here
playlist.waitingForAdmin: Waiting for admin to start playback
playlist.pressPlayHint: Press Play to start the first song
playlist.codeTaken: This code is already in use
